auth.benefit2Rest: visible in real time from any device.
auth.benefit3Rest: Scale without limits with integrated roles, permissions and billing.

auth.brandDesc: A modular platform that adapts to your studio's workflow. Activate only the features you need and scale at your own pace.
auth.feature1: Full visibility of orders and production in real time.
auth.feature2: Integrated client, quote and materials management.
auth.feature3: Multi-user with roles and permissions per company.

legal.consentPre: By creating an account you agree to the
legal.gdprNote: Your data will be processed in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) for service management. Controller: PressMate Pro.
legal.acceptTermsPre: I have read and accept the
legal.acceptPrivacyPre: I have read and accept the
legal.errorConsent: You must accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy to continue.
legal.cookieBody: We save your language preference on your device. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
legal.placeholderWarning: Data in [brackets] are placeholders that must be replaced with real information before publishing this document.

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
sections.body:
PressMate Pro (hereinafter, «the Controller»).
Email: [CONTACT_EMAIL]
Address: [COMPANY_ADDRESS]
DPO: [DPO_EMAIL] (if applicable)

This policy complies with EU GDPR 2016/679. UK users: also applies under the UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018.

sections.title: 2. Data Collected and Purposes
sections.body:
Registration data: name, email, company name, VAT/tax ID.
Application activity logs.
Billing model (payments managed by PCI DSS-compliant provider).

Purposes: (a) providing the contracted service; (b) contract management and invoicing; (c) essential service communications.

sections.title: 3. Legal Basis
sections.body:
· Performance of contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR): to provide the service.
· Legal obligation (Art. 6.1.c GDPR): invoice retention.
· Consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR): optional communications, withdrawable at any time.

sections.title: 4. Retention Period
sections.body: Data retained for the duration of the contract, then until applicable limitation periods expire (typically 5–6 years). Invoice data retained 5 years for tax compliance.

sections.title: 5. Recipients
sections.body: We do not sell or share your data except to cloud infrastructure providers under a DPA, or when required by law. No commercial data sharing.

sections.title: 6. International Transfers
sections.body: Data stored on servers at [SERVER_LOCATION]. Transfers outside the EEA use Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs, Decision 2021/914). UK users: transfers comply with UK IDTA or equivalent safeguards.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.body:
Submit requests to [CONTACT_EMAIL]:
· Access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability (see Account Settings) and objection.

We respond within 30 days. EU users may complain to their national authority. UK users: ICO at www.ico.org.uk

sections.title: 8. Cookies and Local Storage
sections.body: We use localStorage only to maintain your session and language preference. No tracking cookies, third-party analytics or advertising. Withdraw consent via the cookie banner or by clearing browser data.

sections.title: 9. Changes
sections.body: Material changes notified at least 30 days in advance by email or in-app notice.

sections.title: 1. Service Description
sections.body: PressMate Pro is a print job management platform for businesses in the graphic arts sector: orders, quotes, production, materials, machinery and team management.

sections.title: 2. Access and Registration
sections.body: Reserved for businesses and professionals with legal capacity to contract (aged 18+). You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential and for all activities under your account.

sections.title: 3. User Obligations
sections.body:
· Use the service in compliance with applicable law and these Terms.
· Provide accurate information during registration.
· Not share access with unauthorised third parties.
· Notify us immediately of any unauthorised use of your account.

sections.title: 4. Prohibited Uses
sections.body:
· Reverse engineering, decompiling or disassembling the software.
· Using the service for illegal or fraudulent purposes.
· Attempting to access other users' data or accounts.
· Overloading or disrupting service infrastructure.
· Reselling or sublicensing access without written authorisation.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.body: PressMate Pro, its design, code and brand are the property of the Controller. Data entered by users remains their exclusive property.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Controller is not liable for indirect or consequential losses. Total maximum liability shall not exceed amounts paid in the 12 months prior to the event giving rise to the claim.

sections.title: 7. Service Availability
sections.body: We strive for continuous availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. Scheduled maintenance will be communicated in advance where possible.

sections.title: 8. Cancellation
sections.body: Cancel your account from Account Settings or by contacting us. No refund for periods already paid except under mandatory law. We may suspend accounts breaching these Terms, with prior notice except for serious breaches.

sections.title: 9. Modifications
sections.body: Changes notified 30 days in advance. Continued use constitutes acceptance. You may cancel if you do not accept the changes.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
sections.body:
Governed by Spanish law. Business disputes: courts of [JURISDICTION_CITY]. Consumer users retain the right to proceedings in their place of domicile. EU ODR: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr
UK users may also contact CTSI for alternative dispute resolution.

sections.title: 11. Contact
sections.body: [CONTACT_EMAIL]

sections.title: Service Provider
sections.body:
Company name: [COMPANY_LEGAL_NAME]
VAT/Tax ID: [VAT_NUMBER]
Registered address: [FULL_ADDRESS]
Email: [CONTACT_EMAIL]
Phone: [PHONE_NUMBER]
Company registration: [REGISTRATION_DETAILS] (if applicable)

sections.title: Purpose
sections.body: This legal notice governs access to and use of the PressMate Pro application.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content in this application (code, design, text, images and brand) is protected by applicable intellectual property law. Reproduction or distribution without express authorisation is prohibited.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: The Controller does not guarantee continuous availability and is not responsible for damage arising from misuse of the application.

sections.title: Online Dispute Resolution
sections.body: Under EU Regulation 524/2013, EU users may access the ODR platform: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr

formBuilder.title: Form builder
formBuilder.hint: Base fields (machine, material, inks, etc.) always appear. Here you add extra fields specific to your company. Drag and resize to adjust the layout.
formBuilder.hintNative: Base fields (machine, material, inks, etc.) always appear. Here you add extra fields specific to your company.
formBuilder.addHint: ↑ Add custom fields with "+ Field" — they will appear below the base fields
formBuilder.containerDefaultNote: This is a default section — you can only rename it.
formBuilder.deleteMsgCont: Delete section "{{nombre}}"? Fields inside it will become unassigned.

presupuestos.title: How to use Quotes
presupuestos.s1d: Press '+ New' to create a quote with client details, reference and print conditions.
presupuestos.s2d: Use the search bar to find quotes by client or reference.
presupuestos.s3d: KPIs show approved, pending and rejected quotes in real time.
presupuestos.s4d: Each quote can be Pending or Accepted. Change the status based on the outcome of the negotiation.

pedidos.title: How to use Orders
pedidos.s1d: Press '+ New' to register an order. You can create it from an existing quote.
pedidos.s2d: Use the tabs to view 'In progress' or 'Finished' orders.
pedidos.s3d: Open any order to manage files (artwork, PDF-Produccion) and view history.
pedidos.s4d: Inside the detail you can compare this order's PDF with a previous one.

produccion.title: How to use Production
produccion.s1d: Each column represents a machine. Orders are sorted by delivery date.
produccion.s2d: Use search to quickly locate any order in production.
produccion.s3d: Colours indicate each job's status: pending, in progress or ready to deliver.
produccion.s4d: Tap a machine bar to filter by it. With exactly one machine selected, drag rows to reorder production priority.

clientes.title: How to use Clients
clientes.s1d: Press '+ New client' to create a client with name, VAT, email and contact details.
clientes.s2d: Filter by name, email or VAT using the search bar.
clientes.s3d: Tap a client row to edit its details. You can only delete clients with no associated orders.

maquinas.title: How to use Machines
maquinas.s1d: Add machines with their technical parameters: colours, print width, speed and plate.
maquinas.s2d: Each machine defines the conditions used in automatic quote calculation.
maquinas.s3d: View how many orders each machine has assigned and manage its operational status.

usuarios.title: How to use Users & Roles
usuarios.s1d: Add users with email and assign a role. Each user only accesses what their role allows.
usuarios.s2d: In the 'Roles & Permissions' tab, create custom roles and toggle individual permissions.
usuarios.s3d: Set the maximum inactivity time before automatically closing the session.

facturacion.title: How to use Billing
facturacion.s1d: View your active plan: credits (pay-per-use) or subscription (unlimited access).
facturacion.s2d: Choose a package to top up your balance and continue using premium features.
facturacion.s3d: Enable automatic top-up to renew balance when it falls below the configured threshold.
facturacion.s4d: View transaction history by expanding the 'Usage history' section.

help.ayudaIntro: Select a section to start the guided tour. The tour will highlight each key component and explain its functionality.
help.aiIntro: Ask any question about using PressMate Pro. The assistant will only answer questions about the application.
help.aiError: Could not get a response. Please try again.
help.aiNoDisponible: The AI assistant is temporarily disabled. Contact your administrator for more information.
help.aiLimitReached: You have reached the hourly query limit. Please try again later.
